CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-22-2023 Off Calendar

Petition For Approval Of Compromis Of Claim
Off Calendar Feb-22-2023 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for Plaintiff's motion for compromise of claim of Minor, Isaac Arguello.

Dept. 514; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 11:47:42 a.m. and concluding at 12:05:24 p.m.

Plaintiff Isaac Arguello appearing represented by Stephen Collier, Esq. and is placed under oath.
Guardian ad Litem Aracely Guardado appearing represented by Stephen Collier, Esq., is placed under oath and testifies.
Defendant Raymont Wong not appearing.

Counsel for Plaintiff presents brief recitation of case.
Guardian ad Litem is examined by the Court.

Court finds that Isaac Arguello is no longer a minor.

Plaintiff's counsel makes oral motion to withdraw petition of Isaac Arguello.

Oral motion is GRANTED by the Court.

Matter taken off calendar. (D505)

Petition For Approval Of Compromise Of Claim
Off Calendar Feb-22-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for Plaintiff's motion for compromise of claim of Minor, Isaiah Arguello.

Dept. 514; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 11:47:42 a.m. and concluding at 12:05:24 p.m.

Plaintiff Isaiah Arguello appearing represented by Stephen Collier, Esq. and is placed under oath.
Guardian ad Litem Aracely Guardado appearing represented by Stephen Collier, Esq., is placed under oath and testifies.
Defendant Raymont Wong not appearing.

Counsel for Plaintiff presents brief recitation of case.
Guardian ad Litem is examined by the Court.

Counsel for Plaintiff presents explanation of work done on this case, as it relates to it's request for attorney's fees as set forth on the record.

The matter is submitted.
The Court finds the settlement is reasonable and the Guardian ad Litem confirms it is in the best interest of the claimant.

The court hereby APPROVES Plaintiff's Motion for Compromise of Claim for the settlement amount of $110,000.00 minus the following:

1. $35,996.40 for Attorney's Fees
2. $2,000.00 for Costs

Balance of settlement in the sum of $2,500.00 shall be disbursed to the Petitioner, pursuant to Probate Code 3401-3402.

The Petitioner is authorized and directed to execute all documents reasonably necessary to carry out the terms of the settlement.

Proposed Order Approving Compromise of Claim or Action or Disposition of Proceeds of Judgment for Minor or Person with a Disability signed and filed this date.

No further dates set. (D505)

Petition For Approval Of Compromise Of Claim Or Action Or Disposition Of Proceeds Of Judgment For Minor Or Person With A Disability
Off Calendar Feb-22-2023 Granted Per Written Order

The court hereby APPROVES Plaintiff's Motion for Compromise of Claim for the settlement amount of $110,000.00 minus the following:
